subject: feat(compliance): close remaining glow-props pattern gaps
body:
BURGER_MENU: Added destructive (red text) and external (link icon)
properties to MenuItem interface and template rendering.

DEBUG_SYSTEM: Static #debug-root in index.html instead of dynamic
createElement. Subscriber replay delivers existing entries to new
subscribers. Embed mode skip prevents debug pill in iframes.

DOWNLOAD_PDF and EVENT_BUS were already complete — verified.
